allow: PowerShell($tag = "v$\(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'\)"; Write-Host "Tag: $tag"; docker build --platform linux/amd64 -f Dockerfile.jira -t "vcr.vngcloud.vn/111480-abp112121/zalopay-jira-analyzer:$tag" . 2>&1; $global:IMAGE_TAG = $tag)
PowerShell(docker context use default; docker info 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell($tag = "v$\(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'\)"; Write-Host "Tag: $tag"; Set-Location "D:\\AI\\N3"; docker build --platform linux/amd64 -f Dockerfile.jira -t "vcr.vngcloud.vn/111480-abp112121/zalopay-jira-analyzer:$tag" . 2>&1; $env:IMAGE_TAG = $tag; Write-Host "IMAGE_TAG set to: $tag")

PowerShell($tag = "v$\(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'\)"; Write-Host "Tag: $tag"; Set-Location "D:\\AI\\N3"; docker build --platform linux/amd64 -f Dockerfile.jira -t "vcr.vngcloud.vn/111480-abp112121/zalopay-jira-analyzer:$tag" .; $env:NEW_TAG = $tag; Write-Host "Done: $tag")
